name: hello-markdown
goal: Create a Markdown file at README.md whose first non-blank line is the level-1 header '# Hello from UAS' and which also contains a paragraph below the header introducing the project in one sentence.

notes.purpose: Tier 0 smoke test for Markdown production. The first regex pins the H1 form (anchored start/end) so a model that uses '## Hello' or 'Hello from UAS' without the hash fails. The second regex requires a multi-word paragraph somewhere in the file.
